message:
feat(recorder): add backend-agnostic invariant checking with telemetry tagging

Add check_for_backend() to InvariantChecker that records
RecorderBackendKind in the InvariantReport and emits structured
tracing logs with backend tag. Verifies ordering, completeness,
correlation, clock, and replay invariants produce identical results
regardless of append_log vs frankensqlite backend.

10 new tests for backend-agnostic invariant checks.

Closes: ft-2vuw7.1.4.1.1.2.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
